summary: AIR-DROW Final Clean Delivery Edition: cleaned source layout, GitHub-ready real screenshots, fully bilingual dynamic surfaces, premium paired light/dark themes, and an About profile for Sarhang Salah.
features: Keeps the complete product copy synchronized between Kurdish and English, including runtime check cards, camera feedback, calibration, onboarding and recovery surfaces.
Preserves completed hand calibration and onboarding state through neutral persistent keys with one-time migration from prior releases.
Uses six paired light/dark theme palettes with contrast-safe icons, readable controls and consistent premium surface styling.
Adds a local About developer card with Sarhang Salah attribution, a direct Instagram profile link and a scannable QR code for @sarhang.io.
Ships GitHub documentation with two real app screenshots, compact final release notes and a transactional Termux update path.

privacy.drawings: Your drawing data and preferences stay on your device unless you choose to export, share, or use an optional AI creation action.
privacy.camera: Camera permission is requested only after you choose to open the camera. Camera video is not saved by AIR-DROW.
privacy.handTracking: The deployed app uses the local same-origin hand model and runtime. It does not download a hand model while you draw.
privacy.checks: App readiness and Hand drawing check only read local browser and app state. They do not open the camera themselves or send a report anywhere.

buildPolicy.runtimeNetwork: The deployed browser loads the hand runtime and hand model from the same AIR-DROW site.
buildPolicy.delivery: The complete source package includes the verified hand model. The production build validates the local model before publishing.
